data.current_summary: Get holiday schedule for an operator
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve holiday schedule for transit operator
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the holiday schedule for a specified transit operator in the San Francisco Bay Area. This operation returns a list of holidays that affect service schedules, including holiday dates and any service modifications. Use this to determine when regular schedules may not apply or when special service patterns are in effect. Requires API key authentication.
data.reasoning: The current description is completely empty, providing no context about what the operation returns, what parameters are required, or how an AI agent should use it. This helps AI agents understand when to call this operation (e.g., when planning routes around holidays) and what to expect in the response.

data.current_summary: Get transit operators
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all transit operators available in the San Francisco Bay Area. Supports filtering by operator name or region. Returns an array of Operator objects containing operator ID, name, and service area information. Use this operation to discover available transit agencies before querying their lines, stops, or schedules.
data.reasoning: Original description is completely empty. Added context about what operators are returned, filtering capabilities, response schema details, and use case guidance for AI agents to understand when to call this operation.

data.current_summary: Get transit lines for an operator
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve transit lines for an operator
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all transit lines (routes) operated by a specified transit operator. Requires operator ID as input. Supports optional filtering by line name or type. Returns an array of TransitLine objects containing line ID, name, description, and route information. Use this operation after identifying an operator to explore available routes.

data.current_summary: Get transit stops for an operator
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve transit stops for an operator
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all transit stops served by a specified transit operator. Requires operator ID as input. Supports optional geographic filtering by bounding box or stop name. Returns an array of TransitStop objects containing stop ID, name, location coordinates, and accessibility information. Use this operation to find stops within an operator's service area.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added required operator ID parameter, optional geographic filtering capabilities, response schema details (TransitStop objects with coordinates), and use case context for AI agents.

message: Operation 'getStopPlaces' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Description is empty. data.current_summary: Get stop places for an operator
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve stop places for an operator
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves stop places (grouped transit stops at the same location) for a specified transit operator. Requires operator ID as input. Supports optional filtering by stop place name or geographic area. Returns an array of StopPlace objects containing place ID, name, and associated stop information. Use this operation to find multi-modal transit hubs or consolidated stop locations.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added clarification of what stop places are (grouped stops), required operator ID parameter, optional filtering, response schema (StopPlace objects), and use case context for AI agents to understand the distinction from individual stops.

message: Operation 'getPatterns' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Description is empty. data.current_summary: Get route patterns for a line
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve route patterns for a transit line
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all route patterns (directional variants) for a specified transit line. Requires line ID as input. Supports optional filtering by direction or pattern name. Returns an array of RoutePattern objects containing pattern ID, direction, sequence of stops, and geometry information. Use this operation to understand different service directions and stop sequences for a specific route.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added context about route patterns being directional variants, required line ID parameter, optional filtering, response schema (RoutePattern objects with stop sequences), and use case guidance for AI agents.

data.current_summary: Get timetable for a line
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve schedule timetable for a transit line
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the schedule timetable for a specified transit line. Requires line ID as input. Supports optional filtering by date, day of week, or service calendar. Returns a Timetable object containing departure times, trip information, and service day details. Use this operation to access scheduled service times for trip planning.

message: Operation 'getStopTimetable' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Description is empty. data.current_summary: Get timetable for a specific stop
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve schedule timetable for a transit stop
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the schedule timetable for a specified transit stop, showing all lines and departure times serving that stop. Requires stop ID as input. Supports optional filtering by line, date, or day of week. Returns a Timetable object containing scheduled departures for all routes at the stop. Use this operation for stop-centric trip planning and schedule lookups.

data.current_summary: Get GTFS data feed for an operator
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves bulk GTFS (General Transit Feed Specification) data feed for a specified transit operator. Accepts operator identifier and optional parameters to filter or format the feed. Returns complete schedule, route, stop, and service calendar data in GTFS format. Useful for building transit applications, route planning, or analyzing service patterns. Requires valid operator ID obtained from getGtfsOperators.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves real-time trip updates for a specified transit agency, including schedule deviations, delays, and cancellations.
